briefdescription.para: The user can directly manipulate the vector, they can't break anything anyway.
creates a vector with size elements with default value Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>::Vector.
creates a vector with size elements with the given value Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>::Vector.
moves data from the given std::vector<T> Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>::Vector.
returns the identifier of the first element Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>beginId.
returns the identifier of the back() element Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>backId.
returns backId() + 1 Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>endId.
returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap Generated from method MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>heapBytes.
moves data from the given std::vector<T> Generated from constructor MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>::Vector.
std::vector<T>-like container that requires specific indexing type,

parameterdescription.para: type of index (shall be convertible to size_t) Generated from class MR::Vector<MR::Vector<std::vector<MR.ObjVertId>, MR::Id<MR::ICPElemtTag>>, int>. This is the const half of the class.
